<?php return ['[?]', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '*', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '|', '', '', '', '', '', '', '[?]', '[?]', '', '!', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '[?]', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[', '[?]', '<', '> ', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]', '[?]'];
